title: Testing API Endpoints with Supertest Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on API testing with Supertest.

questions.question: Regarding the installation of Supertest via npm, which of these is the correct command?
Which of these is a key step in a Supertest-based workflow for testing an API endpoint?
options: Making a simulated HTTP request—like a GET or POST—directly to your API app and checking the response
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
